reviews.title: The Glass Menagerie
reviews.author: Staff Reviewer
reviews.excerpt: A luminous revival that honors the original while finding fresh emotional resonance.

reviews.title: Death of a Salesman
reviews.author: Staff Reviewer
reviews.excerpt: A gripping production with a towering central performance, though the pacing lags in Act II.

reviews.title: Waiting for Godot
reviews.author: Staff Reviewer
reviews.excerpt: The existential dread is palpable, but this staging fails to unlock Beckett's dark humor.
